testcase.name: test_winner_keyword_produces_bullish_type

failure.message:
AssertionError: WINNER keyword should produce type='bullish', got type='signal'. Bug: webhook endpoint hardcodes type='signal' without calling _detect_alert_type() assert 'signal' == 'bullish'
- bullish + signal

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_webhook_sentiment_fixes.py:113: in test_winner_keyword_produces_bullish_type assert actual_type == "bullish", ( E AssertionError: WINNER keyword should produce type='bullish', got type='signal'. Bug: webhook endpoint hardcodes type='signal' without calling _detect_alert_type() E assert 'signal' == 'bullish' E E - bullish E + signal

testcase.name: test_loser_keyword_produces_bearish_type

failure.message:
AssertionError: LOSER keyword should produce type='bearish', got type='signal'. Bug: webhook endpoint hardcodes type='signal' without calling _detect_alert_type() assert 'signal' == 'bearish'
- bearish + signal

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_webhook_sentiment_fixes.py:129: in test_loser_keyword_produces_bearish_type assert actual_type == "bearish", ( E AssertionError: LOSER keyword should produce type='bearish', got type='signal'. Bug: webhook endpoint hardcodes type='signal' without calling _detect_alert_type() E assert 'signal' == 'bearish' E E - bearish E + signal

testcase.name: test_buy_keyword_produces_bullish_type

failure.message:
AssertionError: BUY keyword should produce type='bullish', got type='signal' assert 'signal' == 'bullish'
- bullish + signal

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_webhook_sentiment_fixes.py:145: in test_buy_keyword_produces_bullish_type assert actual_type == "bullish", ( E AssertionError: BUY keyword should produce type='bullish', got type='signal' E assert 'signal' == 'bullish' E E - bullish E + signal

testcase.name: test_sell_keyword_produces_bearish_type

failure.message:
AssertionError: SELL keyword should produce type='bearish', got type='signal' assert 'signal' == 'bearish'
- bearish + signal
